rows.label: tev000693_MSG0001
rows.name:
Get outta here, you filthy little
furball! You ate all my goddamn jerky![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0002
rows.name: This is exactly why I hate cats![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh, uh...sorry if I was rude to your pet
there. I'm just a dog person, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0004
rows.name:
And say, if they can make Blue Bloods of dogs, why
not make one with the brains of a military dog, slap
some armor on it, and let it explore Mira with us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0005
rows.name:
Its sense of smell would be way
better than ours, so it'd be
perfect for chasing down prey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0006
rows.name:
And unlike most of the worthless humans
around here, it wouldn't go running
away at the first sign of trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0007
rows.name: Well? Whaddya think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_JNK0010
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: tev000693_SEL0011
rows.name: Express fear that it would be eaten by indigens.

rows.label: tev000693_JNK0020
rows.name: Support

rows.label: tev000693_SEL0021
rows.name: Agree that it would be fun to explore Mira with a dog.

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0008
rows.name:
Yeah, I suppose war dogs have
been trained to deal with humans,
but not so much Overeds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0009
rows.name:
In fact, the indigens might
try to target it first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0010
rows.name:
And losing a dog in the line of duty
would be the worst. Just the WORST.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0011
rows.name:
I had a foxhound back
on Earth, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0012
rows.name:
Little guy died when I was 10
years old, and I cried so much
you wouldn't believe it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0013
rows.name:
Of course, Fog Christoph didn't seem sad at all.
He was afraid of dogs, actually, so he never went
anywhere near 'em. ...I know, right? Shocker.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0014
rows.name:
Yeah, I couldn't bear the
thought of watching a dog I
loved get eaten by an indigen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0015
rows.name:
Sure, it would just be a Blue Blood,
but once you name it and start caring
about it, what's the difference?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0016
rows.name:
I guess we got a lot of work to
do before we'll be able to
explore Mira with our pooches.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0017
rows.name:
But maybe once we've wiped
all the dangerous critters
off the face of the planet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0018
rows.name:
Well, it's my day off, so I ain't lifting
a finger. But I'm counting on you to get
out there and make Mira safer, [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0019
rows.name: Right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0020
rows.name: Back on Earth, I had a foxhound.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0021
rows.name:
Fog Christoph was afraid to even get
near him, of course, but me and that
dog were completely inseparable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0022
rows.name:
That old boy is long gone now,
but I'd sure love to take a
dog hunting again one day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0023
rows.name:
But you don't wanna hear me
get all sappy about that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0024
rows.name:
Anyway, I'm gonna go ask Daddy
Vandham if I can take a dog
with me on deployment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0025
rows.name:
He'll probably figure out I've
been drinking and dress me down
good, but I'm going anyway![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000693_MSG0026
rows.name: Wish me luck, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]
